🔍 SHARP SPOTLIGHT: 4a0563

A wallet we've tracked all season.
• Polymarket MLB P&L: $3,130,960
• ROI: 1.3% over $130M traded
• Leaderboard rank: #21 of thousands
• Avg bet: $41,847

Today they're in on 1 game. This is who we watch so you don't have to.

🧠 DATA STUDY

Across 65 graded sides, when proven-wallet margin is +2+, the side hit 53.8%.

Sample: 1079 graded sides with wallet details.

We don't guess. We've tracked this all season. Thread on what it means 👇

🤖 THE BOT REPORT

Today's "sharp money" before we cleaned it:
• 328 wallets scanned
• 371 market makers stripped
• 12 arb bots removed
→ 383 fake "sharps" filtered out

When someone says "sharps are on X," ask: which ones? Most of it is bots.

🗺️ SMART MONEY MAP — 2026-06-17

264 wallets today:

Concentration = conviction.
